The '''Antar Band''' was a crime ring active on the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]]. It was led by the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Ujin Voli]], who named the group after the [[Antar/Legends|planet]] his [[Antar 4/Legends|homeworld]] circled. The Antar Band was mostly a collection of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], thieves, and scavengers, but it posed the biggest threat to [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun's]] dominance of criminal enterprise along the Sisar Run and was hated by Black Sun [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Sprax]]. Other members of the Antar Band included the [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] assassin [[Zirlig]] and the [[Aramandi]] mercenary [[Ar'wa Nonshik]].
